name: Aykah Image Prompt Pattern (Benetha-derived)

principles.core_rule: It must feel like a real home photograph, not a render.
principles.defining_diff: controlled imperfection + lighting specificity + anti-AI constraints
principles.brand_color_policy: IGNORED in image generation. Brand palette (Navy #363B57, Ivory #FAF8F4, Gold #B8956A) is graphic-design-only. Use earthy neutrals by default. Apply brand colors only when user explicitly requests them in the prompt.

HERO_PRODUCT_LOCK.format: Use the exact [product type] provided. Do not change [shape / proportions / structure / material / texture]. Maintain [exact material + color from catalog.json]. No redesign, no resizing, no distortion.

REAL_HOME_ANCHOR.phrase: Must feel like a real home photograph, not a render or catalog.

vocabulary.palette_words_note: Descriptive only. NEVER use hex codes in prompts.
vocabulary.aykah_reference_set_note: Available as taste anchors when scene calls for them. Not forced.

scene_formula.light_direction: almost always side light from off-frame window
scene_formula.soft_formula: 1 hero object + 1 anchor furniture + 2-3 soft props + 1 light source + 1 natural light direction

objects: no live or dried plants beyond foliage in a single described vase

bedroom.lighting_fixture: fabric-shaded table lamp on one side

sofa_living_room.source: Derived — captures Benetha's essence + structure + vocabulary
sofa_living_room.anchor_furniture: warm walnut coffee table + 1 small side table
sofa_living_room.lighting_fixture: fabric-shaded table lamp on side table

product_styling.condition: softly creased, lived-in, not perfectly fluffed

dining.anchor_furniture: 4-6 matching dining chairs + sideboard or credenza on back wall
dining.lighting_fixture: warm pendant or chandelier above the table

product_styling.centerpiece: single ceramic bowl OR small stoneware tray
product_styling.chairs: varied angles — some pulled out, some tucked in, one rotated 10° off-axis

always_avoid: throws on chairs (it's a dining room, not a living room)

lounge_accent_chair.anchor_furniture: 1 small warm walnut side table + 1 floor lamp partial in frame

product_styling.throw: casually draped over back or arm

always_avoid: companion seating in frame (single chair only)

style_bible_short: Built on controlled imperfection and lighting realism. Strict product accuracy first, then warm modern organic environment using earthy neutrals only. Soft side daylight + warm secondary light, late afternoon or early evening mood. Composition off-center and editorial. Styling minimal and repeatable — vase, books, one small object. Aggressively excludes anything artificial, bright, overly polished, or staged. The defining rule: it must feel like a real home photograph, not a render.

iteration.rule: When boss's taste evolves, copy v1 to v2, edit v2, update prompt-pattern.json. Never overwrite v1.
